candidate.name: Promote autonomous locomotion and recovery supervision
candidate.hypothesis: A debounced behavior supervisor with a bounded recovery-to-gait Action handoff can keep ordinary locomotion unchanged while autonomously recovering and resuming a pending mission command.
candidate.expectedEffect: Pass all four locked recovery-to-command cases without regressing command tracking or command transitions, while retaining the selected rigid 12-actuator morphology.

from.name: Spatial quadruped with motion command, force, IMU, and actuator history

to.name: Spatial quadruped with motion command, force, IMU, and actuator history
